articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: Asia markets open higher as hopes for a U.S.-Iran deal rise and oil prices drop - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets track overnight gains in U.S. stocks on lower oil prices and hopes of a Iran-U.S. deal
articles.content:
An electronic stock board inside the Kabuto One building in Tokyo, Japan, on Tuesday, Jan. 28, 2025.
